items.title: Analyst Sees Apple as ‘Eventual Winner on AI at the Edge,’ Keeps $270 Target
items.description: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) is one of the AI Stocks Analysts Are Watching Closely. On October 15, BofA Securities maintained its Buy rating and $270.00 price target on the stock. The firm noted that iPhone shipping dates across Apple’s website and various carrier platforms over the past two weeks demonstrate stable delivery timeframes for iPhone 17 Pro […]

items.title: Saudi Arabia pours $1bn into fallen virtual reality tech company
items.description: Saudi Arabia has ploughed more than $1bn (£744m) into a technology firm developing virtual reality headsets, which has never turned a profit.

items.title: ‘Tech Rally into Year-End’: Daniel Ives Says Momentum Is Building for 3 Tech Stock Giants — Including TSLA
items.description: With the end of the year in sight, and tech stocks having driven the markets sharply higher this year, talk of a potential bubble on Wall Street is growing, à la 1999/2000. The AI boom has powered substantial gains across the semiconductor and software sectors, sending valuations in some high-growth names soaring to more than 50 times forward earnings. The top ten U.S. companies now account for nearly 40% of the S&P 500’s total market cap – levels that rival those seen at the height of the dot-c

items.title: Evercore ISI Maintains Bullish Outlook for Apple Inc. (AAPL) in Latest Update
items.description: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) is among the 14 Best Big Name Stocks to Invest in Right Now. On October 16, Evercore ISI maintained its Outperform rating and price target of $290 for the stock. This is a reaffirmation of their earlier update on September 26, in which they hiked the stock’s price target from $260, following […]

items.title: How the 'Willy Wonka of marketing' is using comedy on LinkedIn
items.description: Henry Hayes is a comedian and head of marketing at Passionfruit, the platform that matches companies with freelance marketing specialists.
